description_long: This is a robust, rectangular metal toolbox painted in a dark green color, featuring a sturdy folding handle on the top for easy carrying. The surface is marked with numerous scratches and scuffs, indicating frequent use and durability. One side of the box displays stenciled yellow military-style text, specifying ammunition details, which suggests it may be a repurposed ammo can. The lid is secured with a heavy-duty latch mechanism, and the box has reinforced edges and corners for added strength. The ends of the box include a circular cutout and a metal loop, likely for securing or locking the box. The overall construction is solid, with a utilitarian design suited for rugged urban or industrial environments.
description: A dark green, metal toolbox with a folding handle, military-style stenciled text, and a heavy-duty latch, showing signs of wear and rugged use.
description_view_0: The side view shows a plain, scratched green surface with the handle visible on top and a latch mechanism on the left edge.
description_view_1: The end view highlights the box's width, the folding handle centered on the lid, and the reinforced hinge structure.
description_view_2: The opposite side displays yellow stenciled text detailing ammunition information, with the handle and latch also visible.
description_view_3: The other end view reveals a circular cutout and a metal loop, likely for locking or securing the box.
attribute_handle_type: Single folding rectangular steel handle, fixed to the lid, with a flat grip and no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Heavy-duty steel clasp latch, padlock-compatible, located on the front side of the lid.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied, no visible trays or dividers; exterior has no additional compartments.
attribute_external_labeling: Yellow stenciled text on one side: '100 CRTG. 50 CAL LINK M9 4-BALL M33 1-TRACER M17 LC-06G614L276'
